coverage_note: Geocoded stop-desks from the openly-published Yalidine/Guepex federated relay plus Anderson, Noest and Maystro's own agency lists — 411 points across 9 carriers. Most Algerian COD carriers (90+) don't publish an open agency list; see carriers.json for the full registry and coverage.json for per-carrier presence.
